summary: P14 added non-interactive SSH execution abstractions, remote nodehost command wrapping, and a ClusterPlan-driven multi-host deployer verified with fake SSH tests.
expected_outputs: Deployer supporting preflight, sync/package, start virtual AZ runtime, run nodehostctl, collect artifacts, cleanup
Multi-host dispatch tests based on ClusterPlan

verified_outputs.output: Deployer supporting preflight, sync/package, start virtual AZ runtime, run nodehostctl, collect artifacts, cleanup
verified_outputs.evidence: harness/deployer.py deploy orchestration and fake SSH command assertions

verified_outputs.output: Multi-host dispatch tests based on ClusterPlan
verified_outputs.evidence: tests/test_p14_multi_mac_ssh.py uses build_cluster_plan on two-mac inventory

commands.command: python3 -m py_compile harness/ssh_exec.py harness/remote_nodehost.py harness/deployer.py harness/scenario_runner.py

risks: No real multi-Mac SSH execution is validated in P14.
Remote package path and nodehostctl installation details remain command-contract level until a real environment phase.
